live_status_gate.detail: inferBaseStatus() requires hasPrice=true AND Binance source with delayMinutes !== null. BINANCE/BINANCE-WS with null delayMinutes returns 'delayed', never 'live'. Live downgrades to delayed at 5min.

label_centralization.detail: Canonical 6-value DataStatus. All labels via getStatusLabel/getStatusColor from data-status.ts. mapLegacyStatus() normalizes old API values.

source_label_leak.detail: BINANCE-WS sourceLabel TR 'Binance WS', EN 'Binance Stream'. 'Canlı' appears only in dataStatusLabel when TTL/provider rules pass.

price_display_consistency.detail: Market page: buildDataStatusMeta. Dashboard: provider-aware wsLiveCount/backendFresh/anyFresh logic, labels from getStatusLabel(). MarketTicker: source===binance-ws + TTL<5min for live. AssetDetailModal: mapLegacyStatus(status)||(livePrice?'delayed':'no_data').

dashboard_aggregate_status.detail: Provider-aware aggregate: wsLiveCount (source==='binance-ws' + TTL<5min) >= 3 → 'live'; wsLiveCount>0 → 'delayed'; backendFresh (source==='backend' + TTL<2min) → 'ayc_data'; anyFresh → 'delayed'; else 'no_data'. Timestamp-only threshold removed. Backend/stooq/coingecko/finnhub sources cannot produce 'Canlı'.

dashboard_realtime_claim.detail: 'Gerçek zamanlı piyasa istihbarat merkezi' replaced with neutral 'Piyasa istihbarat merkezi'.

market_ticker_source_verify.detail: MarketTicker maps PriceEntry.source. verifiedLiveCount: source==='binance-ws' + TTL<5min. tickerStatus: live only with 3+ verified items.

analysis_gating.detail: hasSufficientData uses mappedQualityStatus (post-mapLegacyStatus) to gate target/stop/RR.

dashboard_causal_truth.detail: Causal query gated on btcLiveFresh. Fake values ||80000/volume_ratio:2.1/rsi:62/macd_hist:0.0012 removed.

performance_zero_state.detail: No gold bar when stats.total===0. Gold segment only when stats.pending>0.

social_radar_percentages.fix_detail: proportional scaling when bull+bear>100; all 1610 combinations verified to sum to 100

mobile_safe_area_css.detail: env(safe-area-inset-top) applied to .app-ticker. Real device verification not done.

ticker_duplicates.double_render_note: intentional for seamless CSS scroll animation

browser_mobile_smoke.reason: Playwright Chromium download blocked by network restrictions in sandbox

test_results.deselected_reason: fastapi not in sandbox; pass in CI Ubuntu runner

open_issues.issue: CI not run on HEAD (5d4c86c) — awaiting GitHub Actions
